scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev --workspace @pit/api" "npm run dev --workspace @pit/web"
scripts.start:demo: SERVE_WEB=true AUTH_MODE=demo DATA_REPOSITORY=mock npm run start --workspace @pit/api
scripts.start:beta: SERVE_WEB=true AUTH_MODE=external DATA_REPOSITORY=database npm run start --workspace @pit/api
